sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81276" key="peri/dracis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περί-δραξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81276.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grasping with the hands</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινος</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.392b</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">979d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
